description: AI-powered OSINT agent & MCP server. 16 tools: email, breach, IP, WHOIS, DNS, Shodan, GitHub & more.
name: io.github.OpenOSINT/openosint

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key — required for the AI agent REPL
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: HaveIBeenPwned API key for breach detection (search_breach tool)
environmentVariables.name: HIBP_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: ipinfo.io token for higher IP lookup rate limits (search_ip tool)
environmentVariables.name: IPINFO_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: IP2Location API key for enhanced IP intelligence (search_ip2location tool)
environmentVariables.name: IP2LOCATION_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: AbuseIPDB API key for IP abuse reputation checks (search_abuseipdb tool)
environmentVariables.name: ABUSEIPDB_API_KEY

title: OpenOSINT
